title: Remove restrictions of `gh pr view --json files`
body:
### Describe the feature or problem you’d like to solve The query of `gh pr view --json files` is capped to 100 records now. ### Proposed solution Remove the restrictions by some way, for example, adding option. ### Additional context Discussed in https://github.com/cli/cli/discussions/5359
Originally posted by **SnowCait** March 26, 2022 I try to get files info which PR contains over 500 files. But `gh` returns only 100 files info. ``` $ gh pr view $number --json changedFiles { "changedFiles": 543 } $ gh pr view $number --json files --jq '.files | length' 100 ``` gh version is 2.6.0. Is there any way to get all files info?
